attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386 Mono/.Net assembly, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious execution of Regasm/Regsvcs utilities

values.CommandLine: "C:\Windows\system32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -windowstyle hidden -nop -exec bypass Import-Module BitsTransfer; Start-BitsTransfer 'C:\Users\george\Desktop\program.exe' 'C:\Users\george\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\WindPlugin.exe'

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Change PowerShell Policies to an Insecure Level
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects use of executionpolicy option to set insecure policies

Adversaries may abuse msiexec.exe to proxy execution of malicious payloads.
Msiexec.exe is the command-line utility for the Windows Installer and is thus commonly associated with executing installation packages (.msi)
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious process starts on Windows systems based on keywords
